heading: Larpent vs Launching Place — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Larpent, Victoria and Launching Place, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Larpent and Launching Place have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Larpent or Launching Place safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Larpent has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Launching Place scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Larpent scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Launching Place scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Larpent or Launching Place?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Larpent has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
